news.t: Modernize Fixed Income Portfolios With Income Alternatives
Aureon Expands Cloud Solutions with Ascend for Teams Powered by Intermedia Cloud Communications
Invesco Continues to Expand Active Fixed Income Line-Up to Meet Investor Needs

overview.description: The Invesco Intermediate Municipal ETF (INTM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund focused on investment-grade municipal bonds but may invest in junk bonds also. The portfolio manager seeks dollar-weighted average maturity of four to six years. INTM was launched on Jul 23, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Modernize Fixed Income Portfolios With Income Alternatives
data.text: The traditional approach to fixed income is undergoing a sophisticated evolution. While core aggregate benchmarks remain the bedrock of many fixed income portfolios, advisors are increasingly looking ...

data.title: Aureon Expands Cloud Solutions with Ascend for Teams Powered by Intermedia Cloud Communications
data.text: WEST DES MOINES, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #Aureon--Aureon launches Ascend for Teams with Intermedia, unifying cloud calling and contact center tools to simplify business communications.

data.title: Invesco Continues to Expand Active Fixed Income Line-Up to Meet Investor Needs
